parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT slack_user_id FROM public.slack_user_map WHERE espo_user_id = $1 LIMIT 1) AS slack_user_id;
INSERT INTO public.task_notify_audit (task_id, espo_user_id, slack_channel, slack_ts, event, payload) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'notified', $5::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Build Block Kit').first().json.taskId, $('Build Block Kit').first().json.assignedUserId, ($json.channel || $('Build Block Kit').first().json.channel), ($json.ts || ''), JSON.stringify($json) ] }}
